subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy letter was perused, and its contents were replete with expressions of faith and certitude and steadfastness in the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله نامه شما ملاحظه گردید مضمون مشحون ببیان ایمان و ایقان و ثبوت بر عهد
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @firmness in the Covenant
